Professional UI Framework

Astero UI Framework

Complete Bootstrap-based framework for building stunning admin dashboards and modern websites. Accelerate your development with professional components and layouts.

UI Components

Responsive

Dual-Purpose Framework

Admin Dashboards & Website Templates

One framework, two powerful applications. Build professional admin interfaces and stunning websites with the same consistent, high-quality components.

Admin Dashboard

Admin Dashboard Framework

Complete admin interface solution with sidebar navigation, data tables, forms, charts, and user management. Perfect for backend applications and control panels.

Sidebar Layouts
Data Tables
Form Controls
User Management
View Admin Templates
Website Templates

Website Template Collection

Modern website templates with landing pages, hero sections, and page components. Ideal for business websites, portfolios, and marketing pages.

Landing Pages
Hero Sections
Page Sections
Contact Forms
View Classic Theme
Framework Features

Built for Modern Development

Leverage the latest web technologies and development best practices for creating professional, maintainable user interfaces.

Bootstrap 5 Foundation

Built on the latest Bootstrap 5 with utility classes, responsive grid, and modern components for rapid development.

Astro Build System

Modern build system with Astro for fast, optimized static sites with component-based architecture and hot reload.

Modular Components

Reusable components that work across admin and frontend contexts, promoting consistency and reducing development time.

Easy Customization

SCSS variables and mixins make theme customization straightforward. Change colors, typography, and spacing with simple variable updates.

Developer Experience

Clean, well-organized code with comprehensive documentation, linting, and modern development workflows for productive coding.

Production Ready

Optimized builds, SEO-friendly markup, and cross-browser compatibility ensure your projects perform well in production environments.

Technology Stack

Modern Web Technologies

Built with industry-standard technologies and tools for maintainable, scalable web applications.

Astro

Modern static site generator with component islands and optimal performance

Bootstrap 5

Latest Bootstrap with utility classes and responsive components

SCSS/Sass

Advanced CSS preprocessing with variables and mixins

Modern JavaScript

ES6+ features with modular components and clean architecture

Remix Icon

Complete icon library with 3000+ professional icons

Context7 Documentation

Enhanced documentation powered by Context7 for better developer experience

Perfect For

Who Should Use Astero UI?

Whether you're a solo developer, part of a team, or running an agency, Astero UI provides the tools and components you need to build professional applications quickly.

Frontend Developers
Full-Stack Developers
Design Agencies
Product Teams
Startups
Enterprise Teams
